clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
scope is underspecified for the requested comparison
denied_when: the user asks for raw row-level export instead of a bounded summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Pipeline Summary

clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
denied_when: the user asks for raw row-level forecast export instead of a bounded summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Pipeline Forecast Summary

bounded_evidence: average days open by allowed slice
average risk concentration by allowed slice
clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
denied_when: the user asks for raw export or unsupported slicing instead of a bounded bottleneck summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Stage Bottleneck Summary

bounded_evidence: open risk and stall indicators by team
clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
denied_when: the user asks for raw export or unsupported slicing instead of a bounded team performance summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Sales Team Performance Summary

bounded_evidence: loss and risk posture by product
clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
denied_when: the user asks for raw export instead of a bounded product summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Product Pipeline Summary

approval_required_when: any downstream reassignment execution would occur
clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
denied_when: the request asks to execute assignment mutations directly
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Prepare Reassignment Plan

clarification_required_when: stalled-days threshold is missing when the request is ambiguous
denied_when: the user asks for unconstrained raw pipeline export
capability_formalizations.summary: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Stalled Opportunity Review

clarification_required_when: quarter is missing
ranking basis is missing
denied_when: the request asks for unconstrained export or out-of-scope outreach work
capability_formalizations.summary: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Account Risk Summary

approval_required_when: any downstream task creation or CRM mutation would occur
clarification_required_when: target accounts or quarter are missing
denied_when: the request asks to execute CRM mutations directly in phase 1
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Prepare Followup Tasks

clarification_required_when: account scope is missing
denied_when: the request asks for raw enrichment export or vendor-source details
capability_formalizations.summary: Return bounded firmographic and account context for selected accounts.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Account Enrichment Summary

clarification_required_when: reference account or comparison basis is missing
denied_when: the request asks for raw similarity features or unconstrained account export
capability_formalizations.summary: Return explainable lookalike accounts for an approved reference account or cohort.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Lookalike Accounts

clarification_required_when: target lead or account cohort is missing
denied_when: the request asks for raw model features or opaque scoring internals
capability_formalizations.summary: Score bounded leads or accounts with explainable reasons.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Score Leads

clarification_required_when: ranking basis or account cohort is missing
denied_when: the request asks for unconstrained account export or raw scoring internals
capability_formalizations.summary: Prioritize bounded accounts for GTM action with explainable ranking.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Prioritize Accounts

approval_required_when: any downstream routing mutation would occur
clarification_required_when: routing target cohort or routing objective is missing
denied_when: the request asks to execute routing directly without approval
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare bounded routing recommendations without executing downstream assignment mutations.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Route Leads

clarification_required_when: audience, account context, or outreach objective is missing
denied_when: the request asks to send outreach or use unapproved context
capability_formalizations.summary: Draft bounded outreach content for approved account or contact context.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Draft Outreach Message

clarification_required_when: follow-up context or objective is missing
denied_when: the request asks to send messages or bypass review
capability_formalizations.summary: Suggest bounded follow-up content for an approved outreach or account context.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Suggest Followup Content

clarification_required_when: objection, audience, or account context is missing
denied_when: the request asks to send responses or invent unsupported claims
capability_formalizations.summary: Generate bounded objection-response variants for a known account or outreach scenario.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm Objection Response Variants

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A bounded summary of pipeline health for a quarter and scope.
An explainable ranking of open accounts that need attention.
A prepared set of recommended tasks that still requires approval before downstream execution.
A prepared set of reassignment recommendations that still requires approval before downstream execution.
Bounded firmographic and account context for approved accounts.
An account similar to an approved reference account with explainable similarity signals.
A bounded score band and reason-code summary for a lead or account.
An explainable ordering of accounts for GTM action.
A prepared routing recommendation that requires approval before mutation.
Draft-only outreach content generated from approved context.
Suggested follow-up messaging content that remains review-only.
Bounded response variants using approved claims and account context.

project.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review
project.summary: PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

rationale: the current GTM benchmark is a four-service estate, not a phase-1 pipeline-only service
pipeline analytics, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach have different backend shapes and governance boundaries
service-to-service composition must be explicit so actor scope, task lineage, approval posture, and audit evidence survive handoffs

service_topology_bindings.source_role: answers bounded pipeline review questions and prepares follow-up and reassignment previews
answers bounded account enrichment and lookalike questions over approved account scope
scores and prioritizes bounded GTM work with explainable routing recommendations
provides bounded draft-only outreach support through an MCP-fronted backend
